scenario: Public Health / FAQ — a genuine low-risk consumer info question (no clinical/safety content).
input_text:
SOURCE CHANNEL: Web Portal

Hi, I just got prescribed CholoClear-X. Two quick questions: which pharmacies near me carry it, and do I need to keep it in the fridge or is room temperature okay? Thanks!

— A patient
labeling_notes: Genuine consumer info request (where to buy, how to store) with NO clinical question and NO safety content -> Public/FAQ.
Distinct from out-of-scope spam: this IS a real product question, just low-risk/no-record.
